key_assumptions.source: Sum of parts / catalyst path in IRR steps
Model choice in valuation.json (not company guidance)

open_questions: Confirm activist 13D intent vs passive 13G before stance changes.
Certification milestone probability band (**$0 to $10/sh**) requires human judgment before decision-grade use.
Live price confirmation for final base IRR after mechanical refresh.
thesis: Archer Aviation is a pre-revenue developer of electric vertical take-off and landing aircraft, led by the Midnight air-taxi vehicle designed for urban and regional passenger service. **[Fact]** Shares trade on NYSE (ACHR). **[Fact]** FY2025 revenue was **$0.3 million**, research and development expense was **$493.9 million**, and the company reported a net loss of **$618.2 million** per `investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001824502_26_000019.htm`. **[Fact]** At March 31, 2026, cash was **$951.1 million**, short-term investments **$824.8 million**, and weighted-average diluted shares were **766.9 million** per `investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260511_rpt20260331_acc0001824502_26_000038.htm`.
why_market_wrong: The stock may trade as a binary certification lottery while filing-locked liquid assets already cover a meaningful share of the price. **[Inference]** Net liquid assets of roughly **$2.21 per share** (cash, short-term investments, and restricted cash less debt and warrant liabilities) are not zero, so complete equity wipeout requires either faster burn than disclosed or a large dilution event not yet in the share count. **[Inference]** Conditional partner agreements, including United Airlines' milestone-based purchase framework up to **$1.0 billion** of aircraft plus a **$500 million** option, may be ignored in screens that see only **$1.6 million** of Q1 2026 revenue. **[Inference]** Proof-first component math at base case sums to about **$4.21 per share** versus a price near **$5.31**, so the market embeds modest certification optimism beyond the conservative schedule rather than extreme heroics.
